client: William Grant & Sons, Inc. | The Balvenie
venueAddress: 10775 Smt Clb Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89135
scopeOfWork:
1. CONCEPT & CREATIVE DIRECTION

Old Vegas, after-dark visual world: mahogany, brass, oxblood velvet, aged leather
Look & feel deck, palette, materials, type system, and event mark
On-site signage, menu cards, engraving guide, and printed collateral

2. EXPERIENCE DESIGN — THE BAR (12'-0", round-ended, centered) Three service zones run along the bar top:

Pre-Rolled Cigar Display — curated selection of premium cigars, presented on velvet
The Pour — guided Balvenie flight (DoubleWood 12, Caribbean Cask 14, PortWood 21, Twenty-Five)
Live Engraving Station — LaserPecker LP4 dual-laser, single cigar travel cases engraved to order (~60 sec/piece, ~50/hour capacity)

3. KEEPSAKE — BESPOKE LIVE ENGRAVING

Single cigar travel case (Brilliant Promos #556152681), one per guest
Guest selects mark: initials, monogram, date, or one of three Old Vegas house motifs
Engraved live at the bar, presented on velvet, taken home

4. CIGAR INFUSION — OPTIONAL ADD-ON

Curated humidor infusion: bourbon, cognac, or smoked-tea profiles
Tasting notes card per blend, served alongside the pour

5. ENVIRONMENT & STYLING

Bar build-out: brass-finished round-ended bar with three labeled service zones
White garden florals: bar arrangements (round-ends) + entry pedestal — roses, peonies, hydrangeas
Linen, glassware, hand-cut ice, custom matchbooks, ashtrays
Lighting: low, warm, vignette-style — sconces and candle pillars

6. STAFFING

(1) Lead engraver / activation host — LaserPecker-trained
(1) Brand ambassador — Balvenie pour & guest journey
(1) Cigar attendant — pre-rolled service & humidor
(1) Floral & set lead — install/strike

7. PRODUCTION & INSTALL

Pre-event: design approvals, vendor procurement, engraving file prep, test runs
Day-of: 4-hour install / 4-hour event / 2-hour strike (timing TBD by venue)
Coordination with Summit Club operations, AV, F&B, and security

8. DELIVERABLES

Concept proposal deck (this document)
Final floor plan + dimensioned bar drawings
Engraving template library (3 motifs + monogram system)
On-site activation, fully staffed and managed
Post-event recap deck with photography

9. EXCLUSIONS

Venue rental, base F&B, base AV (provided by The Summit Club)
Cigars and spirits inventory (provided by client / Balvenie)
Guest list management and invitations
paymentTerms: 50% deposit due on acceptance via PayPal invoice. Balance net 15 from event end date. Late balance subject to 1.5%/mo finance charge. Cancellations within 7 days of event subject to 50% retention of total.
